description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a sleek, modern design, featuring a wide, cushioned headband that arches smoothly over the top. The ear cups are large, circular, and padded with soft material for comfort, and they are connected to the headband by sturdy, minimalistic arms. The exterior of the ear cups appears to be made of matte black plastic, while the inner padding is likely covered in synthetic leather or foam. There are no visible wires, suggesting a wireless design, and no branding or control buttons are apparent on the visible surfaces. The overall construction looks robust, with a focus on comfort and durability for extended use. This type of object is commonly used for personal audio listening in urban environments, such as on public transport, in parks, or while walking.
description: A pair of modern, over-ear wireless headphones with cushioned ear cups and a wide, padded headband in matte black. The design is sleek, comfortable, and robust, suitable for personal audio use.
description_view_0: Front view showing both large, padded ear cups and the wide, arching headband.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the ear cup and the curvature of the headband.
description_view_2: Rear view, similar to the front, displaying the back of the ear cups and the headband arch.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the ear cup's depth and headband profile.
